sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Donegal reports Q4 and full-year 2024 results
feed.summary: Donegal Insurance Group reported strong financial results for both Q4 and the full-year 2024, showing significant improvements in net income and combined ratio. The company attributed this success to premium growth, underwriting enhancements, and cost reduction efforts. CEO Kevin G. Burke emphasized ongoing strategies including targeted rate increases and new business development to sustain growth and boost shareholder value.

feed.title: Astronics Corporation stock hits all-time high of 67.59 USD By Investing.com
feed.summary: Astronics Corporation (ATRO) stock has reached an all-time high of $67.59, driven by strong performance and investor confidence in the aerospace sector. Although the stock is trading just below its 52-week high, InvestingPro analysis suggests it may be overvalued and in overbought territory. The company recently reported strong Q3 2025 earnings and received increased price targets from analysts, reflecting positive outlooks for its future growth.

feed.title: Cummins stock hits all-time high at 554.64 USD By Investing.com
feed.summary: Cummins Inc. (CMI) stock has reached an all-time high of $554.64 USD, surging 58.7% over the past year and 64.5% in the last six months. The company, with a market capitalization of $76 billion and a P/E ratio of 28.7, has received "GREAT" financial health from InvestingPro and maintained dividend payments for 55 consecutive years. Analysts have also upgraded their ratings on Cummins, citing strong performance and anticipated growth in various segments.

feed.title: Costamare Inc stock hits 52-week high at $16.40 By Investing.com
feed.summary: Costamare Inc. (CMRE) has reached a new 52-week high of $16.40, signifying a 28.65% increase over the past year and reflecting strong market performance and investor confidence. The company recently surpassed Q3 2025 earnings and revenue expectations, reporting an EPS of $0.81 and revenues of $225.17 million. Costamare also declared cash dividends on its preferred and common stocks, payable in January 2026.

feed.title: BNP Paribas Exane Adjusts Hershey Price Target to $224 From $220, Maintains Outperform Rating
feed.summary: BNP Paribas Exane has increased its price target for Hershey (HSY) to $224 from $220, while reiterating an "Outperform" rating on the stock. This adjustment reflects an updated outlook from the analyst firm for the confectionery giant. The report was published on January 12, 2026, at 10:45 am EST according to MT Newswires.

feed.title: Walmart Joins Nasdaq-100, Teams Up With Google, Shares Surge
feed.summary: Walmart's shares surged after the announcement that it will join the Nasdaq-100 index, replacing AstraZeneca PLC. Additionally, Walmart revealed a partnership with Google to integrate Gemini AI for product discovery and shopping, accessible through a Universal Commerce Protocol. This collaboration aims to revolutionize online shopping with personalized recommendations and expedient delivery options.

feed.title: Goldman Sachs Adjusts EPAM Systems Price Target to $250 From $235, Maintains Buy Rating
feed.summary: Goldman Sachs has increased its price target for EPAM Systems (EPAM) to $250 from $235, reaffirming a Buy rating on the stock. This adjustment reflects a positive outlook from the investment bank for the IT services and consulting company. The article also lists recent analyst adjustments and company news related to EPAM Systems, including other firms maintaining Buy ratings and announcing strategic partnerships.

feed.title: Barclays Downgrades Insulet to Underweight From Equal Weight, Adjusts Price Target to $274 From $316
feed.summary: Barclays has downgraded Insulet (PODD) from Equal Weight to Underweight and significantly lowered its price target from $316 to $274. This reflects a less optimistic outlook from Barclays on the medical device company specializing in insulin-dependent diabetes management. The article also lists other recent analyst adjustments for Insulet, showing a mix of upgrades, downgrades, and price target changes from various financial institutions.

feed.title: CRISPR Therapeutics (CRSP) Is Considered a Good Investment by Brokers: Is That True?
feed.summary: This article examines the reliability of brokerage recommendations for CRISPR Therapeutics (CRSP), which currently has an average brokerage recommendation (ABR) of 1.96, suggesting a "Buy." However, it cautions against relying solely on ABR due to inherent positive bias from brokerage firms, instead advocating for the use of Zacks Rank, a proprietary stock rating tool. The article highlights key differences between ABR and Zacks Rank, emphasizing the latter's timeliness and correlation with earnings estimate revisions for more accurate investment decisions, noting CRSP currently holds a Zacks Rank #3 (Hold).

feed.title: SMCI Plunges 45% in 3 Months: Time to Buy, Sell or Hold the Stock?
feed.summary: Super Micro Computer (SMCI) shares have dropped 44.9% in the last three months, leading to an attractive valuation. Despite facing near-term challenges like contracting gross margins and negative free cash flow due to rapid expansion and customer concentration, the company is strategically positioning itself to capitalize on the AI market with high-performance servers and new product lines. Therefore, the article suggests holding the stock for now, acknowledging both its challenges and growth potential.

feed.title: Moderna Hits 2025 Revenue Goal as Operating Costs Fall Faster than Forecast
feed.summary: Moderna announced unaudited full-year 2025 revenue of $1.9 billion, aligning with its target range and Wall Street consensus. The company also reduced its 2025 operating expense forecast to $5 billion to $5.2 billion, demonstrating faster-than-expected cost-cutting. Despite these positive updates, Jefferies analysts suggest more reductions are necessary for Moderna to confidently achieve its 2028 break-even target, projecting break-even might occur between 2029 and 2030.

feed.title: Lululemon hints it had a strong Christmas, says Q4 sales at high end of guidance
feed.summary: Lululemon Athletica Inc. announced that it expects its net revenue and diluted earnings per share for its fourth quarter to be at the high end of its guidance, signaling a strong holiday season performance. This positive outlook comes as the company faces a proxy battle and prepares for a change in leadership with CEO Calvin McDonald stepping down. Founder Chip Wilson and activist investor Elliott Management are pushing for significant changes to the board and CEO selection process, while Lululemon maintains confidence in its current board.

feed.title: Is Bank of America Stock Worth Owning Ahead of Q4 Earnings?
feed.summary: Bank of America (BAC) is set to announce its Q4 and full-year 2025 results on January 14, with analysts expecting strong revenue and earnings growth driven by net interest income (NII) and capital markets performance. While the company has an impressive earnings surprise history, its Earnings ESP suggests a low chance of beating estimates this quarter. Investors are advised to watch management's NII and investment banking outlook during the earnings call, and current shareholders are encouraged to hold for long-term potential.

feed.title: Zimmer Biomet Holdings (ZBH) Announces Executive Resignation
feed.summary: Zimmer Biomet Holdings (ZBH) announced the resignation of Mark Bezjak, a named executive officer, effective January 16, 2026. Bezjak is departing to pursue another business opportunity, having already ceased to be an executive officer as of July 1, 2025. This leadership change is significant for the musculoskeletal healthcare company and its stakeholders.

feed.title: American Electric Power (AEP) Receives Downgrade from B of A Sec
feed.summary: American Electric Power (AEP) received a downgrade from 'Buy' to 'Neutral' by B of A Securities, with a price target reduction from $131.00 to $122.00 USD. This adjustment comes amidst varied analyst ratings, where UBS maintained a 'Sell', JP Morgan a 'Neutral', Jefferies upgraded to 'Buy', and Citigroup maintained a 'Neutral' in recent weeks. AEP, a large regulated utility, has an average analyst target price of $129.10, suggesting a 10.10% upside, but GuruFocus estimates a GF Value of $108.21, implying a 7.71% downside.

feed.title: AirNexis Launches To Take On Merck In Expanding PDE3/4i COPD Field
feed.summary: AirNexis has launched with the goal of competing with Merck & Co. in the growing PDE3/4i market for Chronic Obstructive Pulmonary Disease (COPD). The article highlights the expanding interest in this therapeutic area, referencing Merck's acquisition of Verona and GSK's deal with Hengrui for similar inhibitors.

feed.title: Synchrony Financial stock slides on Trump’s 10% credit-card rate cap push — what to know now
feed.summary: Synchrony Financial shares dropped about 7% after former President Donald Trump called for a one-year, 10% cap on credit-card interest rates. This proposal could significantly affect lenders like Synchrony, which rely heavily on interest income, potentially leading them to tighten credit standards or increase fees. While the legal viability of such a cap is uncertain, investors are closely monitoring the situation as bank earnings season begins.

feed.title: The Midstream Renaissance: Why ONEOK is Positioned as the Energy Sector’s Top Growth and Yield Play for 2026
feed.summary: ONEOK (NYSE: OKE) is highlighted as a top growth and yield play in the energy sector for 2026, benefiting from strategic acquisitions and significant synergy realization. The company is poised for substantial EPS and Adjusted EBITDA growth, aiming to accelerate shareholder returns after deleveraging. This strong performance is driven by increased demand from AI data centers and U.S. LNG exports, positioning ONEOK as a key infrastructure provider in a favorable regulatory environment.

feed.title: Dynavax Technologies stock hits 52-week high at $15.68 By Investing.com
feed.summary: Dynavax Technologies (DVAX) stock has reached a new 52-week high of $15.68, reflecting a 25.32% increase over the past year and a 45.65% return in the last six months. The company, known for vaccine development, boasts a market capitalization of $1.78 billion and a strong current ratio of 7.62. Recent news includes strong Q3 2025 earnings and Sanofi's agreement to acquire Dynavax for $2.2 billion, a 39% premium over its closing share price on December 23, 2025.

feed.title: NVR Inc.: The Quiet Giant Redefining America’s Homebuilding Machine
feed.summary: NVR Inc. is presented as a "quiet giant" in the homebuilding industry, distinguished by its asset-light, highly optimized platform focused on efficiency and risk reduction. The article details NVR's core strategies: an asset-light land acquisition model, standardized construction with local flexibility, and an integrated mortgage banking arm (NVR Mortgage), all contributing to its valuation premium. It contrasts NVR's approach with major competitors like D.R. Horton, Lennar, and PulteGroup, highlighting NVR's emphasis on stability, disciplined capital allocation, and a system built for cyclical markets.

feed.title: Braskem discloses details of restructuring talks for Braskem Idesa debt By Investing.com
feed.summary: Braskem S.A. announced that its subsidiary Braskem Idesa S.A.P.I. has entered into restructuring talks for its 7.450% Senior Secured Notes due 2029 and 6.990% Senior Secured Notes due 2032. While discussions included proposals from both Braskem Idesa and investors, no agreement has been reached to date, with Braskem Idesa declining the investors' terms. The company will keep the market informed of future material developments.

feed.title: Cboe Global Markets stock hits all-time high at 263.23 USD By Investing.com
feed.summary: Cboe Global Markets stock reached an all-time high of $263.23, reflecting strong investor confidence and the company's growth in global financial markets. The company has a "GREAT" financial health score, a 22% return on equity, and a history of consistent dividend payments. This milestone follows record trading volumes in 2025 and recent analyst upgrades, although InvestingPro suggests the stock is trading slightly above its Fair Value.

feed.title: UBS Adjusts Price Target on CF Industries to $86 From $91, Maintains Neutral Rating
feed.summary: UBS has adjusted its price target for CF Industries Holdings, Inc. (CF) to $86, down from the previous target of $91, while maintaining a Neutral rating on the stock. This update reflects an analyst's revised outlook on the agricultural chemicals manufacturer. Other financial institutions have also recently revised their price targets and ratings for CF Industries.

feed.title: AlphaTON Capital Closes $46M AI Infrastructure Expansion to
feed.summary: AlphaTON Capital has announced a $46 million AI infrastructure expansion to address the demand for confidential compute, involving the deployment of 576 NVIDIA B300 chips. This deal is projected to deliver a 27% IRR and 3.82x equity multiple, focusing on privacy-preserving, decentralized AI infrastructure through its integration with Telegram's ecosystem and Cocoon AI. The company aims to provide alternatives to Big Tech infrastructure for AI workloads requiring data sovereignty and privacy.

feed.title: Costamare Inc stock hits 52-week high at $16.40 By Investing.com
feed.summary: Costamare Inc. (CMRE) stock has reached a new 52-week high of $16.40, marking a significant 28.65% growth over the past year. This milestone follows strong third-quarter 2025 earnings, where the company surpassed analyst expectations for both EPS and revenue and declared several preferred and common stock dividends.

feed.title: Global Payments Inc. completed the acquisition of Worldpay, LLC from GTCR LLC and Fidelity National Information Services, Inc..
feed.summary: Global Payments Inc. has finalized its acquisition of Worldpay, LLC from GTCR LLC and Fidelity National Information Services, Inc. This transaction, valued at $17 billion initially, was first announced in April 2025 and involved a mix of cash and stock for GTCR. Concurrently, Fidelity National Information Services, Inc. completed its acquisition of Global Payments' Issuer Solutions business for $13.5 billion.

feed.title: BofA Hikes First Solar Target (FSLR) to $291, Eyeing a 2026 Stock-Picker's Cycle
feed.summary: Bank of America has raised its price target for First Solar (FSLR) to $291, maintaining a Buy rating, while Guggenheim also increased its target to $312, both anticipating a "stock-picker's cycle" in 2026. Conversely, Jefferies downgraded FSLR to Hold, expressing caution about the company's 2026 outlook due to booking visibility and potential tariff dilution. First Solar is a solar technology company operating internationally.

feed.title: Cummins stock hits all-time high at 554.64 USD By Investing.com
feed.summary: Cummins Inc. (CMI) stock reached an all-time high of $554.64, driven by a 58.7% increase over the past year and a 64.5% surge in six months, bringing its market cap to $76 billion. Despite signals of being in overbought territory and trading slightly above its Fair Value, the company's strong market position and focus on innovation are contributing to its performance. Several firms have upgraded Cummins' stock rating, citing strong performance in distribution, power systems, and anticipated growth in the power segment, indicating a positive shift in analyst sentiment.

feed.title: Cboe Global Markets stock hits all-time high at 263.23 USD
feed.summary: Cboe Global Markets Inc. (CBOE) has reached an all-time high of $263.23 per share, driven by strong investor confidence, a 9.56% price return over the past year, and robust trading volumes across its options exchanges. The company maintains an "overall great" financial health score and has consistently paid dividends, with analysts revising earnings upwards for the upcoming period. Recent news includes record trading volumes in 2025 and varied analyst ratings, with Barclays upgrading to Overweight and UBS increasing its price target, while Raymond James maintains a Market Perform rating.

feed.title: Portnoy Law Firm Announces Class Action on Behalf of F5, Inc. Investors
feed.summary: The Portnoy Law Firm has announced a class action lawsuit on behalf of investors in F5, Inc. (NASDAQ: FFIV) who purchased securities between October 28, 2024, and October 27, 2025. This action follows F5's disclosure that a nation-state threat actor had unauthorized long-term access to certain F5 systems, leading to the exfiltration of BIG-IP source code and vulnerability information. Following this news, F5's share price declined by 10.70%.

feed.title: Northrop Grumman wins $233 million contract for Navy’s advanced torpedo
feed.summary: Northrop Grumman has secured a $233 million contract from the U.S. Navy to produce an advanced lightweight torpedo, the MK54 MOD 2, featuring a custom-designed warhead for increased lethality. This new weapon, developed in cooperation with the Australian Defence Force, will enhance existing torpedo variants with advanced processing capabilities. Northrop Grumman will handle the manufacturing and qualification phases, leveraging its extensive facilities and experience to expedite delivery to the U.S. Navy.

feed.title: Morgan Stanley Lifts Smurfit Westrock (SW) PT to 4,000GBp on 2026 Synergy Gains
feed.summary: Morgan Stanley has increased its price target for Smurfit Westrock (SW) to 4,000 GBp from 3,900 GBp, maintaining an Overweight rating due to anticipated 2026 synergy gains. This move comes despite some other firms like Truist and Citi lowering their price targets slightly, citing challenges in packaging volumes but noting successful volume increases by some consumer packaged goods companies. Smurfit Westrock manufactures and distributes paper-based packaging products.

feed.title: JPMorgan vs. PNC Financial: Which Bank Stock Has More Upside in 2026?
feed.summary: This article analyzes JPMorgan (JPM) and PNC Financial (PNC) to determine which bank stock offers greater upside potential in 2026, considering the impact of interest rate changes. While JPMorgan benefits from its scale and diversification, PNC Financial is presented as the better buy due to its stronger expected NII and earnings growth, better valuation, and strategic branch expansion plans. PNC currently holds a Zacks Rank #2 (Buy), whereas JPM is a Zacks Rank #3 (Hold).

feed.title: Moderna says its expects $1.9 billion in 2025 sales amid better-than-expected vaccination rate
feed.summary: Moderna projects $1.9 billion in revenue for 2025, exceeding previous guidance, primarily due to higher-than-anticipated COVID-19 vaccination rates despite political challenges. The company, which has seen financial losses since 2023, aims to break even by 2028 through cost-cutting and new product development like norovirus and combination COVID-19/flu vaccines. This financial update was shared at the JPMorgan Healthcare Conference.

feed.title: Mizuho Hikes Micron (MU) PT to $390 on Strong 2026 AI Memory Outlook
feed.summary: Mizuho analyst Vijay Rakesh raised Micron Technology Inc.'s (NASDAQ: MU) price target to $390 from $290 with an Outperform rating, citing a strong 2026 AI memory outlook. The firm broadly revised price targets across the semiconductor sector, prioritizing AI accelerators, wafer fab equipment, optical components, and memory. Additionally, Micron announced the launch of its Micron 3610 NVMe SSD, the industry's first PCIe Gen5 G9 QLC SSD for client computing, designed to bring high capacity and performance to mainstream PCs and AI-ready devices.

feed.title: Portnoy Law Firm Announces Class Action on Behalf of DeFi Technologies, Inc. Investors
feed.summary: The Portnoy Law Firm has announced a class action lawsuit against DeFi Technologies, Inc. (NASDAQ: DEFT) on behalf of investors who purchased securities between May 12, 2025, and November 14, 2025. The lawsuit alleges that DeFi Technologies made false and misleading statements regarding delays in its DeFi arbitrage strategy, understated competition, and was unlikely to meet revenue guidance for fiscal year 2025. Investors have until January 30, 2026, to file a lead plaintiff motion.

feed.title: CONMED (NYSE:CNMD) Issues FY 2026 Earnings Guidance
feed.summary: CONMED (NYSE:CNMD) has issued its FY 2026 earnings guidance, projecting EPS between $4.25 and $4.45 and revenue between $1.3 billion and $1.4 billion. These figures are slightly below Street consensus estimates and represent a step down from the company's FY 2025 guidance. Following the announcement, CONMED's shares traded down approximately 0.6%, and analysts have reiterated a "Reduce" rating with an average price target of $53.67.

feed.title: AbbVie (ABBV) Secures Global Rights to RemeGen's RC148
feed.summary: AbbVie (ABBV) has secured exclusive global rights outside Greater China to RemeGen's bispecific antibody, RC148, for advanced solid tumors. The deal involves an initial payment of $650 million to RemeGen, with potential milestone payments up to $4.95 billion. This agreement aims to strengthen AbbVie's oncology portfolio, despite the company's financial metrics indicating high leverage and declining margins.

feed.title: Senge RJ convoca trabalhadores(as) da AXIA Energia/Eletrobras para AGE em 13/01
feed.summary: Senge RJ and Sintergia RJ are calling for an Extraordinary General Assembly (AGE) on January 13, 2026, for employees of AXIA Energia (Eletrobras). The assembly aims to discuss and deliberate on a collective lawsuit against AXIA Energia for differences in Profit Sharing (PLR) stemming from dividend distribution, fixed judicial expenses, and a 0.5% deduction from PLR differences for legal measures. Additionally, a proposal for a unified time bank for AXIA (Eletrobras) and general matters will be discussed via Zoom, requiring mandatory registration.

feed.title: Autonomous Research Adjusts Price Target on Chubb to $348 From $319, Maintains Outperform Rating
feed.summary: Autonomous Research has increased its price target on Chubb (NYSE: CB) shares to $348 from $319, while reaffirming an Outperform rating on the stock. This adjustment reflects a positive outlook from the research firm regarding the insurance company's future performance. The news comes amid several other analyst updates for Chubb, indicating varied perspectives on its valuation.

feed.title: Wolfe Research Lowers Simon Property Price Target to $196 From $202, Maintains Outperform Rating
feed.summary: Wolfe Research has lowered its price target for Simon Property Group (SPG) to $196 from $202, while keeping an "Outperform" rating on the stock. This adjustment comes amidst other analyst revisions for Simon Property, with some maintaining neutral ratings and others raising or lowering targets. Simon Property Group specializes in owning and managing shopping centers and factory outlets, with a portfolio of 229 properties as of late 2024.

feed.title: Autonomous Research Adjusts Price Target on Invesco to $28 From $24, Maintains Neutral Rating
feed.summary: Autonomous Research has updated its price target for Invesco (IVZ) to $28, an increase from the previous $24, while keeping a Neutral rating on the stock. This adjustment comes amidst other analyst actions, with Evercore ISI raising its target to $31 and Jefferies to $29. The article provides a company profile for Invesco Ltd., highlighting its asset management activities, geographic distribution of net sales, and upcoming Q4 2025 earnings release.

feed.title: NVIDIA and Lilly Announce Co-Innovation AI Lab to Reinvent Drug Discovery in the Age of AI
feed.summary: NVIDIA and Eli Lilly and Company have announced a first-of-its-kind AI co-innovation lab aimed at transforming drug discovery. The two companies plan to invest up to $1 billion over five years, combining Lilly's expertise in medicine with NVIDIA's AI leadership. The lab will develop a continuous learning system using AI-assisted experimentation, focusing on building next-generation foundation models for biology and chemistry, and expanding into clinical development, manufacturing, and commercial operations.

feed.title: Lobbying Update: $60,000 of PFIZER INC lobbying was just disclosed
feed.summary: PFIZER INC (PFE) recently disclosed $60,000 in lobbying expenditures for Q4 2025, focusing on regulations impacting the pharmaceutical industry. This comes alongside recent congressional stock trading activity in PFE shares and significant hedge fund movements, with analysts maintaining a median price target of $27.0 for the stock.

feed.title: Intel, Infineon, Synopsys Back European Scaleup Program
feed.summary: Ignite Next, a new pan-European deep-tech scaleup program, has launched with the backing of industry giants Intel, Infineon, and Synopsys. Spun out from Intel Ignite, the independent program aims to help European deep-tech startups, particularly those with hardware-focused technologies, achieve commercial scale more rapidly without taking equity or charging fees. The program, headquartered in Dresden, Germany, focuses on connecting and mentoring startups and addressing the "Pre to B" phase challenges, with plans to expand its partner ecosystem and focus on the future of computing.

feed.title: Ignite Next Welcomes Synopsys to its Scale-up Program for Deep Tech Innovation
feed.summary: Ignite Next, a deep tech innovation scale-up program, has announced that Synopsys, a leader in engineering solutions, has joined as a focus technology collaborator. This partnership, which also includes Infineon and Intel, aims to support European deep tech founders by providing tools, infrastructure, technology, and strategic industry expertise. The program operates on a non-dilutive, founder-first model, focusing on IP-heavy breakthrough technologies like semiconductors and AI to help startups transition from early-stage ventures to globally competitive scale-ups.

feed.title: AbbVie Down 3% in a Month: Why Holding the Stock Still Makes Sense
feed.summary: AbbVie (ABBV) stock has declined 3.2% in the past month, partly due to rumors of a failed takeover bid for Revolution Medicines. Despite this and the loss of exclusivity for Humira, the company is successfully navigating these challenges with strong performance from new drugs like Skyrizi and Rinvoq, a growing oncology and neuroscience portfolio, and strategic acquisitions. Investors are advised to stay invested due to robust earnings growth expectations, a promising pipeline, and decent valuation.

feed.title: Loop Capital Adjusts Price Target on W.W. Grainger to $1,050 From $950, Maintains Hold Rating
feed.summary: Loop Capital has increased its price target for W.W. Grainger (GWW) to $1,050 from $950, while maintaining a Hold rating on the stock. This adjustment comes amidst other analyst actions on the industrial supplies distributor, with various firms providing updated price targets and ratings. The article also provides a company profile and recent financial news concerning W.W. Grainger.

feed.title: How to listen in as Eastman breaks down its 2025 results live online
feed.summary: Eastman Chemical Company (NYSE: EMN) has announced that it will release its fourth-quarter and full-year 2025 financial results on Thursday, January 29, 2026, around 4:15 p.m. Eastern Time. A live webcast and teleconference for investors to discuss these results will follow on Friday, January 30, 2026, at 8:00 a.m. Eastern Time. The company provides details on how to access the webcast, teleconference, and replays, along with investor and media contact information.

feed.title: Nvidia to Invest $1 Billion in AI Drug Laboratory With Eli Lilly
feed.summary: Nvidia Corp. plans to invest $1 billion over five years in a new artificial intelligence drug laboratory in Silicon Valley, partnering with Eli Lilly & Co. The goal is to accelerate the application of AI in the pharmaceutical industry by bringing Lilly's expertise closer to the hub of AI innovation. The project is described as a joint investment between the two companies.
